note: Example configuration for Windows desktop systems

storage.note: Assumes MCP filesystem access or local execution

customization_notes.paths: Update drive letter if you use C:\ or another drive
customization_notes.shell: Change to 'cmd' if you prefer Command Prompt
customization_notes.ollama: Update endpoint if running Ollama on different host/port
customization_notes.path_separators: Windows uses backslashes - keep them escaped in JSON (\\)
